creator: wkb@chello.nl
text:
A *lot* of work on NFS has been put into FreeBSD 4.0R. I'm not sure to
what extent rpc.lockd is addressed but it appears to be worthwhile to 
check the mailing list archives on www.freebsd.org for more information.

Or just give 4.0R a try ;-)

--
